args.query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' OR Id LIKE '%003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' OR Id LIKE '%003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR%';

args.query:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '') = REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')
JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(oi.Product2Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(p.Id, '#', '')
WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId, '#', '') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '') = REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')
JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(oi.Product2Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(p.Id, '#', '')
WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId, '#', '') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';
